program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Starting and keeping an informal conversation at a congress -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 4 -- Small Talk & Networking
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 4 -- Small Talk & Networking

listenings.text: Hi! Nice to see you here. How is it going? My name is Laura, and I am from Boston. How was your trip? Mine was long, but I really enjoyed it. By the way, what do you think of the congress? I love the talks this year. Actually, this is my first time in Chicago. Let us catch up during the coffee break. See you there!

Hi Fernando, this is David. It was nice to see you at the congress today. I really enjoyed our talk. By the way, are you free during the break tomorrow? Let us catch up over a coffee. I want to hear more about your network. Also, how was your weekend in Chicago? Call me back. Talk soon.
